chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI FRA No.01 of 2023 and IInd Appeal No.176 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge FRA No.01 of 2023 Hearing / Priority 1. For order on CMA No.6592/2025. 2. For order on CMA No.6593/2025. 3. For hearing of CMA No.510/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. IInd Appeal No.176 of 2020 Hearing of case 1. For order on CMA No.6604/2025. 2. For order on CMA No.6605/2025. 3. For order on CMA No.6606/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 30.09.2025 Mr. Wahaj Ali Khan, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Iftikhar Javed Qazi, Advocate for the respondents. ------------------------------- 1&2. In FRA No.01 of 2023, Mr. Wahaj Ali Khan, counsel for the appellant, submits that he has moved these applications one for urgency and the other for withdrawal of the appeal. Counsel’s vakalatnama is available on record. Urgency is granted. The application for withdrawal simplicitor is allowed and the instant FRA is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application with all legal consequences. 1-3. In IInd Appeal No.176 of 2020, Mr. Wahaj Ali Khan, learned counsel appearing on behalf of the appellant, submits that the appellant has moved these three applications one for urgency and the other two applications for withdrawal of the appeal. Urgency is granted. He is instructed by his senior counsel and as a similar withdrawal application was moved in FRA No.01 of 2023 today in which he had filed vakalatnama, therefore, in the circumstances, the applications for withdrawal in this IInd Appeal are allowed simplicitor and the instant IInd Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application subject to all legal consequences.

Urgency is granted. He is instructed by his senior counsel and as a similar withdrawal application was moved in FRA No.01 of 2023 today in which he had filed vakalatnama, therefore, in the circumstances, the applications for withdrawal in this IInd Appeal are allowed simplicitor and the instant IInd Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application subject to all legal consequences. J U D G E Asif
